title: Amateur Podracing Circuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Amateur Podracing Circuit''' was a series of seven [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] courses across [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Beginning on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and ending on [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]], these courses were deemed simplistic by seasoned racers, as these courses served as a fast-paced introduction to the deadly sport. The flare of a new [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] crashing towards their [[Death/Legends|death]] was a common spectacle during these races.

The circuit began at Tatooine's [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] with a shortened version of the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] track. The races that followed were held on [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]], [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]], [[Aquilaris]], [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], and [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] before returning to Mon Gazza for the final race.

The courses in the Amateur Circuit featured segments of most of the longer and more complex tracks in the [[Semipro Podracing Circuit]], [[Galactic Podracing Circuit/Legends|Galactic Podracing Circuit]], and [[Invitational Podracing Circuit]].<ref name="Star Wars: Episode I Racer">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]</ref>

{{Stub}}

#[[Vengeance (Oovo IV)|Vengeance]]
#[[Spice Mine Run]]

==Behind the scenes==
Completing races in the Amateur Podracing Circuit would unlock playable characters [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]], [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]], [[Clegg Holdfast/Legends|Clegg Holdfast]], [[Fud Sang/Legends|Fud Sang]], and [[Mars Guo/Legends|Mars Guo]]. Finishing first in all races would unlock the first race of the [[Invitational Podracing Circuit]].
